eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 8:13 AM on JUL 23, 2026 Effective until 4:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Robert Vaughn last seen on foot wearing a white Arizona Diamondback baseball cap, red t-shirt, khaki shorts and unknown shoes. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
